content.en:
"Elder!"

Ye Tian is also interested in this position.

There are very few elder positions in the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and one-fifth of the legends have the hope of becoming an elder in the Dao realm, and once they become an elder, they have more channels to obtain resources, and it is easier to contact the elders.

Moreover, the elders can redeem more goodies.

What's more, if he became an elder, even the Qin clan would not dare to offend him.

After all, the Qin clan is only one elder, a dozen or so elders.

"If you want to enter the supreme realm of the Sea of Mist, ask Elder Longyan to sign up, and at that time, I will capture the traces of the Sea of Mist and send you in. The sixteenth elder Mo Xian said.

Subsequently.

The Sixteenth Patriarch left.

"Now you're going to the Sea of Fog to sign up for me!" said Elder Longyan Ancient Emperor.

However.

Even so, many deacons did not sign up.

For them, being in this position is already good, satisfied, and not wanting to continue to take risks.

Moreover, there are forces behind them, waiting for a long time, accumulating merit little by little, and there is also hope to obtain breakthrough resources and become a legendary Dao realm.

But this time it would be too dangerous to go to the Sea of Fog and compete with a group of Legends to the Dao Realm.

Even Su Ya, she hesitated for a moment and decided to give up.

However, Su Changsheng applied.

He is a legend to the Dao realm, with a legendary body, if you prepare more life-saving things, there is still hope of survival, good luck, you can also get a great opportunity.

Therefore, he naturally dared to go in.

Ye Tian also applied for the first time.

After applying, he left the Supreme Void and waited for the notice of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance before going to the Sea of Mist.

......

After a period of time, the notice of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance came.

The sea of fog has descended, and the sixteenth elder has captured the traces of the sea of fog and immediately goes to the Mohe fortress.

Mo River Fortress.

A group of deacons and elders of the Innate Origin Alliance descended here.

This time, about a hundred elders came, and the number of deacons was about thousands.

This is a huge scale.

But there will only be more on the side of the Supreme Dao Void Demon, not less.

Seeing that the deacons who signed up were all here, and the elders who were going to go in had also arrived, the sixteenth patriarch Mo Xian appeared.

"This is the legendary Supreme Dao Treasure - Ten Thousand Dao Mirror, I will turn a trace of the origin of the Ten Thousand Dao Mirror into a mark and integrate it into your arms, and how many Supreme Dao Void Demons you have killed will be displayed. "

Elder Mo Xian began to operate.

Airplanes!!!!

Wisps of origin turned into imprints and melted into the arms of deacons and even elders.

Ye Tian's arm was also integrated with a trace of origin imprint, turning into a mirror-like imprint.

After doing all this, Elder Mo Xian waved his hand, and all the deacons and elders turned into small dots and fell into his hands.

The next moment.

Elder Mo Xian's arm broke through the depths of endless time and space, captured the traces of the Sea of Mist, and with one hand, he broke through the barrier of the Sea of Mist and sent a group of Supreme Dao Realm inside.

Followed by.

Elder Mo Xian captures the traces of the sea of fog all the time, and does not let the sea of fog leave his perception.

On the other side, the same is true for the Supreme Dao Void Demon side, if the sea of fog is taken out of perception, it will not be easy to find, and it will be difficult for those Supreme Dao Void Demons to return.

......

"Sea of Fog, come in!"

Now.

Ye Tian found himself in a sea of mist, with the earth under his feet, but the fog was too thick.

He tried to urge the second sequence of the Dao Rule, but found that he really couldn't do it.

In addition, it is difficult to mobilize the original power and willpower in the body.

He didn't panic, after all, he knew the situation before he came.

Whew!!!!

A famous Dao realm has left.

Even if they can't use the Supreme Dao Rules, and they can't use their origin power and will power, they are still very fast and their combat power is very strong by relying on their pure physical fitness.

Ye Tian also chose a direction and left.

"I can't use the Supreme Dao Rules, my strength has been affected the most, but I have comprehended the second sequence of Supreme Dao Rules, and I can't use them, so my strength is not much different from those who have taken the path of the Supreme Dao. No, I'm still a little bit more physical. "

After all, Ye Tian comprehended the rules of the second sequence of supreme paths, and his body was tempered by the rules of the second sequence of supreme paths, so he was naturally more powerful, but it was not as powerful as the body of legends.

"It's up to you to see if you can replicate your body!"

Ye Tian began to condense his copy body.

Airplanes!

The replicating body begins to coalesce.

"Sure enough, even the sea of fog can't stop me from condensing the copy body, so that I will have a copy body!" Ye Tian muttered.

Having a replica body is the same as having a life.

Moreover, the origin mark of the Ten Thousand Dao Mirror left by Elder Mo Xian can also be copied, and any copy body that kills the Dao Void Demon will be perceived by the Ten Thousand Dao Realm, which can be regarded as his credit.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian's copy body was scattered, looking for resources, and he was also looking for the Supreme Dao Void Demon.

"Sure enough, the Sea of Fog has no ordinary resources, and after looking for so long, I haven't found anything!"

Ye Tian frowned.

If he didn't understand the situation, he would have thought it was just an ordinary place.

Time passes.

Suddenly.

He sensed the fluctuations of battle ahead.

He flew over and soon came to the place of the battle.

Thundered!!!!!

Two Legendary Dao Realms are fighting, one is the Legendary Dao Realm of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and the other is the Legendary Dao Void Demon, they are both fighting with the body of legends, every move and every style does not contain the power of the Dao rules, it is purely physical strength to fight.

It didn't take long for the legendary Dao Realm to be injured.

Obviously, the Legendary Dao Void Demon was a little stronger.

However, Ye Tian still didn't go to help, but snooped in secret.

Without the rules of the Supreme Path, without the origin and willpower, they are slow to recover, and they are more likely to be injured in battle.

Gradually, their injuries were all valuable, especially the legendary Dao realm, who was extremely injured, and wanted to escape, but the speed was too slow, and he couldn't escape at all.

Therefore, that legendary Dao realm can only fight.

Just when the other party was about to fall, Ye Tian appeared.

"Deacon Lin, you go, this legendary Dao Void Demon will be handed over to me!"

Ye Tian appeared and shouted.

The legendary Dao Realm, who was called Deacon Lin by Ye Tian, came from the Lin clan and also recognized Ye Tian.

Although Ye Tiancai reached the Dao Realm with nine folds, Ye Tian was willing to save himself, so he naturally would not refuse.

Without saying a word, he fled directly.

"Thank you, Deacon Ye!"
